snippet.title: SCH - Loup Noir | A COLORS SHOW
snippet.description:
French rapper Julien Schwarzer aka @SCH shares a performance of cinematic new song "Loup Noir"

New COLORS Apparel out now: https://shop.colorsxstudios.com

Follow
Ō¢Č Stream: https://colors.lnk.to/allshowscxs
Ō¢Č Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/schmathafack
Ō¢Č Instagram: https://instagram.com/sch
ŌĆö
Follow COLORS:
Ō¢Č COLORS Apparel: https://colors.lnk.to/shopcxs
Ō¢Č On Socials: https://lnk.to/socials
Ō¢Č On Spotify: https://colors.lnk.to/Spotify
Ō¢Č On Apple Music: https://colors.lnk.to/applemusic
Ō¢Č On the Web: https://colorsxstudios.com

COLORSXSTUDIOS is a unique aesthetic music platform showcasing exceptional talent from around the globe. COLORS focuses on the most distinctive new artists and original sounds in an increasingly fragmented and saturated scene. All COLORS shows seek to provide clear, minimalistic stage that shines a spotlight on the artists, giving them the opportunity to present their music without distraction.

LOUP NOIR 
LYRICS

Les sourires et les faux semblants 
Et quelques gouttes ont suffit 
A lŌĆÖ├®lixir pour ├¬tre mortel 
Que des caisses noires dans le cort├©ge 
Des 3-pi├©ces et des longs impers qui cachent les guitares 
Des reufs  au mitard 
Les faits divers en hiver 
JŌĆÖai fait 100 000 avant le mis-per  

JŌĆÖmŌĆÖentra├«ne ├Ā sourire devant la glace 
JŌĆÖmŌĆÖentra├«ne ├Ā souffrir sans rem├©de 
Le petite maison est en ruine 
Quand la faim pense, 
le coeur est en gr├©ve 
La vie cŌĆÖest mener les bons choix 
LŌĆÖimage vient sans m├¬me une esquisse 
Dans le dos les schlass traversent la redskins
La trahison des gens quŌĆÖon estime 
JŌĆÖai pas vu p├©re fermer les paupi├©res 
T├¬te dans le guidon cŌĆÖ├®tait le frigo 
Une chienne de vie ├Ā se lever aux aurores 
JŌĆÖaurai jamais su comment faire 
JŌĆÖaurai jamais su comment perdre 
Avec la haine de ceux quŌĆÖon enferme  

Et quand les yeux se ferment et que tout est noir 
Quand les mots se perdent 
Tu veux  tuer un homme 
Prend du Sky et des faux espoirs 
Et quand les m├┤mes se perdent 
Dans les sinueux couloirs des enfers 
On sera de retour 2 minutes avant 
Que les revolvers leur jouent du tonnerre 
LŌĆÖorage est parti o├╣ est le soleil 
Mon deuil nŌĆÖest pas fait o├╣ est mon sommeil┬Ā

JŌĆÖparle de vraies choses quŌĆÖon vit ici 
De vrais flingues quŌĆÖon a tenu
DŌĆÖun vrai sang qui sŌĆÖest vers├®
De la seule femme qui mŌĆÖa berc├® 
De vrais potes quŌĆÖon a perdus 

Des pens├®es noires et des nuits blanches 
Des armes des enfants terribles 
Le b├®ton le bruit du ciment 
L├Ā o├╣ on veut pas finir int├®rim 
Des gens mŌĆÖont trahi jŌĆÖai la naus├®e 
JŌĆÖd├®pose un flingue et quelques roses 
Sur le verso dŌĆÖun livre us├® 
├ēnum├®rer ce que jŌĆÖy ai laiss├® 
Prendre un maximum pour papa 
Comme si jŌĆÖallais le faire rena├«tre 
DŌĆÖentre les morts comme un Dieu grec 
Tous les bleus que jŌĆÖai autour du coeur 
Tous ces billets froiss├®s dans mon sac 
Trop jeune pour embrasser le plomb 
Mais trop jeune pour vivre tout ├¦a 
Des borsalino dans la nuit 
Des portes flingues tournent dans la ville 
Du sang ├Ā ├®ponger dans la cuisine 
Des billets qui flottent dans la piscine 
Little Italy Corleone sous Michael 
Marie Curie dans la compteuse
L├Ā o├╣ le ventre est le prompteur 

La faim justifie la violence 
L├Ā o├╣ la violence est la r├®ponse 
L├Ā o├╣ la violence est le moteur 
L├Ā o├╣ la violence est le docteur 
Vivons cach├®s vivons gant├®s 
faisons le tour du monde entier 
Avant quŌĆÖune balle nous arr├¬te 
J.V.L.I.V.S

#colors #SCH #loupnoir

YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeŌĆŗŌĆŗ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaŌĆŗ #FutureNostalgiaŌĆŗ #Grammys

snippet.title: Kosso & Dorentina | Wintersessie 2021 | 101Barz
snippet.description:
Kosso & Dorentina kwamen vorig jaar als eerste koppel de 101Barz studio blessen en hadden de best bekeken sessie van 2020. Vandaag zijn ze weer bij Rotjoch in de booth om het nog eens dunnetjes over te doen. Lees verder op: https://www.bnnvara.nl/101barz/artikelen/kosso-dorentina-pakken-door

#KOSSO #DORENTINA #WINTERSESSIE #101BARZ

Mixed & Mastered by Rawbeem

101Barz is het grootste hiphop-platform van Nederland met wekelijks nieuwe video's. Natuurlijk brengt Rotjoch elke week de welbekende studiosessies op je beeldscherm, maar dat is niet alles. We gaan langs bij producers en zien hoe zij een beat maken voor de beginnende artiesten thuis in de serie 'BPM'. We zoeken talenten op in hun eigen buurt om ze beter te leren kennen in 'Talent vd Maand'. Ben je op zoek naar wat langere interviews? Dan is 'Ins & Outs' iets voor jou!

Volg ons ook op:
­¤ö┤ Website: https://101barz.nl
­¤īÉ Twitter: https://twitter.com/101barz 
­¤öĄ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/101BarzOfficieel
­¤¤ż Instagram: https://instagram.com/101barznl

Wil jij de redactie iets mailen? Stuur het naar info@101Barz.nl

101Barz is een online platform van BNNVARA, onderdeel van de Nederlandse Publieke Omroep.

snippet.title: De kapel van Klooster Het Hoompje | De Drop #2
snippet.description:
Wie van ons moet in zijn eentje de hele nacht in de kapel van Klooster 'Het Hoompje' verblijven? Paranormale onderzoekers hebben aangegeven hier liever niet terug te keren.

Giel, Thomas of Stefan moeten ALLEEN de hele nacht op de engste plekken van Nederland verblijven. Wie het wordt, bepaalt het lot!
#stuktv #dedrop

DISCLAIMER
Tijdens de opnames van deze aflevering was de avondklok nog niet ingevoerd. Giel, Thomas, Stefan en de crew zijn voor aanvang van de opnames negatief getest op Corona. 

Met dank aan:
www.ghost-store.nl

snippet.title: Fast fashion - Les dessous de la mode ├Ā bas prix | ARTE
snippet.description:
En quelques d├®cennies, la "fast fashion", ou mode jetable, a r├®volutionn├® lŌĆÖindustrie textile ├Ā bas prix. Enqu├¬te sur l'impact social et le co├╗t environnemental d'un secteur qui ne conna├«t pas la crise.

Renouveler en permanence sa garde-robe sans se ruiner : rien de plus simple aujourdŌĆÖhui. Tandis que les marques qui font le pari de vendre exclusivement en ligne se multiplient, lŌĆÖachat de v├¬tements tient d├®sormais pour beaucoup dŌĆÖentre nous du loisir ├Ā part enti├©re. Une tendance entretenue par les nouveaux acteurs de la fast fashion sur les r├®seaux sociaux qui, via un marketing subtil, r├®mun├©rent les influenceurs pour placer leurs produits. Ces derni├©res ann├®es, des marques dŌĆÖultra fast fashion se sont m├¬me lanc├® le d├®fi de produire et de livrer encore plus vite et moins cher que les vendeurs traditionnels. Mais leur efficacit├® se paie au prix fort. En Grande-Bretagne, ces v├¬tements sont fabriqu├®s dans des ateliers insalubres par des ouvriers pay├®s la moiti├® du salaire minimum. Au-del├Ā de son impact social, la fast fashion, deuxi├©me industrie la plus polluante au monde, a aussi un co├╗t environnemental. M├¬me quand ce mod├©le industriel promet de sŌĆÖamender en proposant une mode plus durable, sa facture ├®cologique reste lourde.

Tragique constat
Alors que 56 millions de tonnes de v├¬tements sont vendues chaque ann├®e dans le monde, les journalistes dŌĆÖinvestigation Gilles Bovon (Starbucks sans filtre) et ├ēdouard Perrin ont enqu├¬t├® sur lŌĆÖimpact social, environnemental et sanitaire de ce secteur en plein boom.┬ĀEn Europe, aux ├ētats-Unis et en Inde, ils ont rencontr├® des acteurs du secteur ┬ĀŌłÆ anthropologue, professeur dŌĆÖ├®conomie, chercheur en neuromarketingŌĆ” ŌłÆ et se sont infiltr├®s au c┼ōur de lŌĆÖindustrie textile. Au Royaume-Uni, ils ont pu filmer des ateliers de fabrication ill├®gaux et interviewer des personnes qui ont c├┤toy├® de pr├©s la fast fashion (ex-styliste, influenceuse mode, ancien associ├® du fondateur de Zara...). Riche de t├®moignages, leur film dresse le bilan trop peu ├®coresponsable dŌĆÖune industrie qui brasse des milliards.

Fast fashion - Les dessous de la mode ├Ā bas prix
Documentaire d'Edouard Perrin et Gilles Bovon (France, 2020, 1h32mn)
Disponible jusqu'au 07/06/2021

Ik moet even richting styling, want heb zometeen een clipshoot
Gezicht is al verbrand, ik kan dit echt niet meer voor niks doen

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicŌĆÖs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen├® Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s├żje, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s├żje for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: DIKKE | Wintersessie 2021 | 101Barz
snippet.description:
L-Season! DIKKE z'n EP '130 Kilo' wist eerder dit jaar de Belgische hitlijsten te domineren en vandaag is hij bij Rotjoch in de studio om je barz te brengen. Lees verder op: https://www.bnnvara.nl/101barz/artikelen/dikke-gaat-de-grens-over

#DIKKE #WINTERSESSIE #101BARZ

Mixed & Mastered by Rawbeem

101Barz is het grootste hiphop-platform van Nederland met wekelijks nieuwe video's. Natuurlijk brengt Rotjoch elke week de welbekende studiosessies op je beeldscherm, maar dat is niet alles. We gaan langs bij producers en zien hoe zij een beat maken voor de beginnende artiesten thuis in de serie 'BPM'. We zoeken talenten op in hun eigen buurt om ze beter te leren kennen in 'Talent vd Maand'. Ben je op zoek naar wat langere interviews? Dan is 'Ins & Outs' iets voor jou!

snippet.title: Kasteel Doornenburg | De Drop #1
snippet.description:
Wie van ons moet in zijn eentje de hele nacht in Kasteel Doornenburg verblijven? En zullen de oud-bewoners van dit kasteel contact proberen te maken?

Giel, Thomas of Stefan moeten ALLEEN de hele nacht op de engste plekken van Nederland verblijven. Wie het wordt, bepaalt het lot!
#stuktv #dedrop

DISCLAIMER
Tijdens de opnames van deze aflevering was de avondklok nog niet ingevoerd. Giel, Thomas, Stefan en de crew zijn voor aanvang van de opnames negatief getest op Corona. 

Met dank aan:
www.ghost-store.nl
www.NPRT.nl

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryŌĆÖs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonŌĆÖt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit

snippet.title: MILAN KNOL & DUTCH PERFORMANTE STROOIEN MET GELD - GELDROVERS | Gierige Gasten
snippet.description:
Exclusieve autoŌĆÖs, helikopters en de duurste huizen ├®n kastelen van Nederland. In deze aflevering ervaren de Gierige Gasten eindelijk hoe het is om te zwemmen in het geld. Welk team lukt het om op de foto te gaan met de meest waardevolle spullen? Milan Knol & Chahid Charrak aka Dutch Performante dagen de Gierige Gasten uit voor Ōé¼449! #GierigeGasten #Geldrovers #MilanKnol #Knollergang #DutchPerformante

Met dank aan De Fabrique (https://defabrique.nl/).

Minder betalen, meer leven!
Abonneer op ons kanaal voor alle gratis tips: http://bit.ly/subGierigeGasten

Blijf op de hoogte van onze avonturen via:
http://www.instagram.com/gierigegasten

Volg ons ook op Instagram op:
http://www.instagram.com/gierigegasten
http://www.instagram.com/nielsoosthoek
http://www.instagram.com/martijnmanschot
http://www.instagram.com/fitboyjossa

Check ons ook op KIJK: 
http://www.kijk.nl/gierigegasten

Wij, Gierige Gasten, vinden het leven al duur genoeg. Daarom plaatsen wij elke dinsdag op 16:00 uur een nieuwe video waarin wij shit voor weinig of helemaal gratis regelen. En omdat we tegenwoordig geld krijgen van ome John, kunnen we af en toe ook een '├®chte' serie maken, die zie je elke donderdag om 16:00 uur! Noem ons gierig, karig, inhalig, krenterig, hebzuchtig, knijperig of zelfs schraperig. Wij noemen het slim!

snippet.title: 400 km/u in PEPERDURE Nissan?! | Daily Driver | DAY1
snippet.description:
Deze Nissan GTR met rond de 2000pk breekt alle wetten van de natuur!! Vandaag zijn Jay-Jay en Job te gast bij Total Car Concept waar misschien wel de vetste en snelste auto's van ons land staan... Een en al genieten geblazen dus!

Kaarten DAY1 WORLD OF CARS! https://www.day1worldofcars.com 

DAY1 WORLD OF CARS Instagram https://instagram.com/day1worldofcars?igshid=1u62qb1ianqcu

Kijk iedere zaterdag om 11:00 een nieuwe aflevering van DAY1!

Meepraten over deze video? Kom gezellig in onze Discord server!
­¤öĘDiscord: https://discord.gg/StgPaEXC7c

Shop nu jouw favoriete auto parfum of doping-vrije voedingssupplementen hier:
­¤öĘ XONE: https://xone.nl
­¤öĘ The Car Parfum: https://www.thecarparfum.com 


Shout-out naar het team achter de schermen:
­¤öĘ Camera: Thijs Ahsmann - @Thijsahsmann
­¤öĘ Edit: Dario Ferraro - @Dazzerzz
­¤öĘ Animatie/design: @studio.stilt
­¤öĘ Muziek: https://open.spotify.com/user/jayjayboske?si=TGMqi-cJTx63p8srmNw4Pw

Volg ons op Instagram:
­¤öĘ @day1lifestyle
­¤öĘ @day1worldofcars
­¤öĘ @jayjayboske
­¤öĘ @djlafuente

Check hier onze wekelijkse DAY1 podcast:  
­¤öĘ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/19Aoq5eiE0yVwP1nlM5ufc
­¤öĘ Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/day1lifestyle 
­¤öĘ Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/nl/podcast/day1-podcast/id1504234285

Kom jij ook naar h├®t auto event van het jaar?
Koop jouw tickets nu via https://www.day1worldofcars.com

ENJOY, LIKE & SUBSCRIBE! #DAY1 

Elke dag is een nieuwe kans om beter te worden dan dat je gister was, om meer uit het leven te halen en de mensen om je heen te inspireren. DAY1 staat voor de kans die zich iedere dag voordoet om alles uit jouw dag te halen. Hard werken, nooit opgeven en genieten van jouw succes. Vandaag is de dag om te laten zien dat niets onmogelijk is.

snippet.title: Tikkende tijdbom: de volgende mega-aardbeving
snippet.description:
Precies tien jaar geleden kreeg Japan een van de zwaarste aardbevingen ooit over zich heen, met een tsunami en een kernramp erbovenop. De vraag is: waar komt de volgende mega-aardbeving? Want dat die komt, dat is zeker. Leggen we je uit. 

Luister ook naar onze podcast, Lang verhaal kort, in je favoriete podcast-app! Ook op Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3Ab6DGFJL7VE5ToIH4r6w1?si=DqrwE6L2TvOb99FF1D2d3A

Meer videoŌĆÖs? Abonneer je op ons kanaal en praat mee! https://bit.ly/2PJk8Xg

Volg NOS op 3 ook op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nosop3

We bedanken hoogleraar seismologie Arwen Deuss van de Universiteit Utrecht voor haar deskundige feedback op het script. In deze video van de Universiteit van Nederland legt zij uit waarom de wetenschap nog niet zo ver is dat het kan voorspellen wanneer aardbevingen gebeuren: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q-E5PoOE8Q0 

Muziek:
Noria - 'Seashore'
Rujay - 'Bad Dreams'
Rujay - 'On Ice'

---------------------------------------------------------------

ŌŚÅ VRAGEN/TIPS/IDEE├ŗN? We horen graag wat jij van het nieuws en onze uitleg vindt, laat je horen in de comments! Of mail ons: nosop3@nos.nl 

ŌŚÅ VOLG ONS OOK HIER: Facebook: https://facebook.com/nosop3 Twitter: http://twitter.com/nosop3

___________________________________________________

De NOS is de grootste nieuwsorganisatie van Nederland. Bij NOS op 3 vind je elke zaterdag nieuws dat je niet mag hebben gemist. Wij gaan voor jou op onderzoek uit naar nieuws uit jouw wereld. Ook vind je hier uitleg bij het nieuws.

#Japan #aardbeving

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: I Hitchhiked the World's Deadliest Train (20hrs across the Sahara)
snippet.description:
Become smarter in 5 minutes by signing up for free today: http://cen.yt/mbyestheory - Thanks to Morning Brew for sponsoring todayŌĆÖs video.

­¤ÖÅ­¤Å╝ Thank you for making these videos possible through your support of Seek Discomfort 
ŌÜĪ’ĖÅ SEEK DISCOMFORT: http://seek-discomfort.com/yes-theory

The Mauritanian Railway, one of the world's longest and heaviest train in the world transports iron ore from a remote mining town in Mauritania to a coastal city cutting through the Sahara Desert. The ride lasts anywhere between 19-30 hours and a few brave locals use it to travel back and forth with supplies. The dangerous trek leads to several unfortunate deaths every year as people fall off the train. Thomas and his friend Drew Binsky attempt to find this train and embark on the dangerous journey through the Sahara.

Thank you to Drew Binsky for coming with me and guiding me through how to travel in this part of the world! Check out his channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/user/thehungrypartier

Thank you to our local friend Med for some of the b-roll shots of the train.

snippet.title: Les origines de la Grande Muraille de Chine
snippet.description:
Dans notre imaginaire collectif, la Grande Muraille de Chine est un immense mur fortifi├® en pierre, dŌĆÖun seul tenant sur plusieurs milliers de kilom├©tres, et construit par les Chinois pour se d├®fendre face ├Ā des invasions barbares. Et les th├®ories les plus loufoques vont jusquŌĆÖ├Ā affirmer quŌĆÖon peut la voir depuis la Lune. M├¬me si cŌĆÖest faux, ├¦a montre quand m├¬me bien lŌĆÖimportance quŌĆÖon lui donne, et ├Ā quel point on la voit comme un ouvrage massif. Dans cette vid├®o on va voir ensemble ce quŌĆÖest en r├®alit├® ce que nous, Occidentaux, appelons la ┬½ Grande Muraille de Chine ┬╗.

Cet ├®pisode est sponsoris├® par Tianci M├®dia, merci ├Ā eux de permettre la production de cette s├®rie qui nous fait voyager !

snippet.title: Ta Joela verpest Qucee's freestyle | SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE ft. Donnie
snippet.description:
ABONNEER op Supergaande als je altijd op de hoogte wilt blijven!
https://Supergaande.lnk.to/abonneer

In Supergaande Freestyle strijden Qucee, Nesim, Ta Joela en een gast om wie het creatiefste is met bars. De groep spelen om de kroon in twee rondes: Switch Up en Freestyle.

In Switch Up wordt er een kaart gepakt waarop de lyrics staan van een bekend nummer. Fraasie draait een beat waarop het nummer gebracht moet worden. De rest van de groep moet vervolgens raden om welke track het gaat.

In de final round gaat de groep in Freestyle op basis van een woord zolang mogelijk proberen rappen. De eerste die choked, is eruit.

-----------

snippet.title: GRAMMYs 2021: Harry Styles Sings Watermelon Sugar in ELECTRIFYING Performance
snippet.description:
Harry Styles can take a bow after his first award win and debut performance at the 63rd annual GRAMMY Awards, which aired on CBS. The 27-year-old singer won Best Pop Solo Performance for his song 'Watermelon Sugar,' which he performed live earlier in the broadcast. Harry's first GRAMMY win was met with applause from his fellow nominees, including Billie Eilish and Taylor Swift, who dated Harry in 2012.

#GRAMMYs2021

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Recap
snippet.description:
On March 3, Starship serial number 10 (SN10) completed SpaceXŌĆÖs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype as it successfully ascended, transitioned propellant, and reoriented itself for reentry and an active aerodynamic controlled descent. SN10ŌĆÖs Raptor engines reignited to perform the vehicleŌĆÖs landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad.

Test flights such as SN10ŌĆÖs are about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: James Corden Recaps the GRAMMYs
snippet.description:
James Corden kicks off the show with a full recap of a huge night of the GRAMMYs, produced by his friend and Late Late Show executive producer, Ben Winston. After recapping everything from Harry Styles's suit to Beyonce's record-setting wins to Taylor's comfy A-frame cabin, James looks ahead to President Joe Biden's tour of the country.

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Justin Bieber: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit ŌĆö stripped-down sets, an intimate setting ŌĆö just a different space.

Stephen Thompson | March 17, 2021
If you were to apply one of those "how it started / how it's going" memes to Tiny Desk (home) concerts ŌĆö which began, it turns out, almost exactly one year ago ŌĆö you'd have, under "how it's going," the image of pop superstar Justin Bieber as he and his band perform the world premiere of a new song called "Peaches."

"Peaches" will exist in a significantly different form when Bieber drops his new album Justice on Friday ŌĆö the track will feature guest vocals from GIVE┼īN and Daniel Caesar ŌĆö just as "Holy," another song from Justice, opens this set without the presence of guest Chance the Rapper. But Bieber's Tiny Desk set, performed with the aid of We the Band, provides the fullest taste yet (fully 25 percent!) of the singer's sixth album, whose singles have already been streamed hundreds of millions of times.

Bieber has had a massive month as he prepares for Justice to drop: March 2021 began with the singer's 27th birthday and recently produced his second career Grammy, as he took the prize for best country duo or group performance for "10,000 Hours" with Dan + Shay. It continues with this, his Tiny Desk debut. Friday, the next chapter officially begins.

SET LIST
"Holy"
"Peaches"
"Hold On"
"Anyone"

MUSICIANS
Justin Bieber: vocals, keys
Harv: bass
O'Neil "Doctor O" Palmer: keys
DJ Tay James: DJ
Robert Taylor: drums
Julian McGuire: guitar

CREDITS
Video: Nick Demoura, Mike Drew, Rory Kramer, Aaron Kroger, James Coker
Audio: Jim Ebdon, Dylan Ely, James Roach, Chris Houghton, Taylor Meyer
Production Manager: Chris Gratton
Camera Operators: Austin Wavra, Daniel Mardoyan, Noel Galan
Lighting Tech: Jim Mecsery

TINY DESK TEAM
Producer: Bobby Carter
Video Producers: Maia Stern, Morgan Noelle Smith
Audio Mastering: Josh Rogosin
Tiny Production Team: Bob Boilen, Kara Frame
Executive Producer: Lauren Onkey
Senior VP, Programming: Anya Grundmann

#justinbieber #tinydesk #nprmusic #pop #rnb

localized.title: Justin Bieber: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
localized.description:
The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit ŌĆö stripped-down sets, an intimate setting ŌĆö just a different space.

Stephen Thompson | March 17, 2021
If you were to apply one of those "how it started / how it's going" memes to Tiny Desk (home) concerts ŌĆö which began, it turns out, almost exactly one year ago ŌĆö you'd have, under "how it's going," the image of pop superstar Justin Bieber as he and his band perform the world premiere of a new song called "Peaches."

"Peaches" will exist in a significantly different form when Bieber drops his new album Justice on Friday ŌĆö the track will feature guest vocals from GIVE┼īN and Daniel Caesar ŌĆö just as "Holy," another song from Justice, opens this set without the presence of guest Chance the Rapper. But Bieber's Tiny Desk set, performed with the aid of We the Band, provides the fullest taste yet (fully 25 percent!) of the singer's sixth album, whose singles have already been streamed hundreds of millions of times.

Bieber has had a massive month as he prepares for Justice to drop: March 2021 began with the singer's 27th birthday and recently produced his second career Grammy, as he took the prize for best country duo or group performance for "10,000 Hours" with Dan + Shay. It continues with this, his Tiny Desk debut. Friday, the next chapter officially begins.

SET LIST
"Holy"
"Peaches"
"Hold On"
"Anyone"

MUSICIANS
Justin Bieber: vocals, keys
Harv: bass
O'Neil "Doctor O" Palmer: keys
DJ Tay James: DJ
Robert Taylor: drums
Julian McGuire: guitar

CREDITS
Video: Nick Demoura, Mike Drew, Rory Kramer, Aaron Kroger, James Coker
Audio: Jim Ebdon, Dylan Ely, James Roach, Chris Houghton, Taylor Meyer
Production Manager: Chris Gratton
Camera Operators: Austin Wavra, Daniel Mardoyan, Noel Galan
Lighting Tech: Jim Mecsery

TINY DESK TEAM
Producer: Bobby Carter
Video Producers: Maia Stern, Morgan Noelle Smith
Audio Mastering: Josh Rogosin
Tiny Production Team: Bob Boilen, Kara Frame
Executive Producer: Lauren Onkey
Senior VP, Programming: Anya Grundmann

#justinbieber #tinydesk #nprmusic #pop #rnb

snippet.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"When It's All Said And Done...Take Time" available at: https://Giveon.lnk.to/WhenItsAllSaidAndDone_TakeTime
"Heartbreak Anniversary" Official Audio: https://youtu.be/nja_0BaQcNg

Follow Giveon:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/giveon/?hl=en
Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/Giveonmusic/
Soundcloud:  https://soundcloud.com/giveon

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

(C) 2021 Epic Records. With Not So Fast LLC.

#Giveon #HeartbreakAnniversary #WhenItsAllSaidAndDoneTakeTime

snippet.title: Tirreno-Adriatico EOLO 2021 | Stage 3 Last km
snippet.description:
Mathieu van der Poel ha vinto la terza tappa della Tirreno-Adriatico
Wout van Aert ancora in Maglia Azzurra 
Gualdo Tadino, 11 marzo 2021 ŌĆō Mathieu van der Poel (Alpecin-Fenix) ha vinto la terza tappa della Tirreno-Adriatico Eolo, da Monticiano a Gualdo Tadino (219 km). Sul traguardo ha preceduto Wout van Aert (Team Jumbo-Visma) e Davide Ballerini (Deceuninck - Quick Step). Wout van Aert ├© ancora in Maglia Azzurra.

Mathieu van der Poel wins Stage 3 of the Tirreno-Adriatico
Wout van Aert retains the Maglia Azzurra
Gualdo Tadino, 12 March 2021 - Mathieu van der Poel (Alpecin-Fenix) has won the third stage of the 56th edition of the Race of the Two Seas,  Monticiano ŌĆō Gualdo Tadino (219 km), ahead of Wout van Aert (Team Jumbo-Visma) and Davide Ballerini (Deceuninck - Quick Step). Wout van Aert retains the Maglia Azzurra.

snippet.title: The Harry-Meghan-Oprah Interview Is All the Buzz
snippet.description:
James Corden kicks off the show recapping Oprah Winfey's interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, and James realizes the "wedding" he attended wasn't very official at all. And James gives us a handsy tutorial on how to milk a cow. After, Reggie Watts attempts to explain NFT art to James, who cannot pronounce "indistinguishable."

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Murder kill | HERRES #4 | NPO 3
snippet.description:
Wanneer Dex en Jayden ontdekken dat de conci├½rge hondengevechten organiseert in de aula na schooltijd waar je veel geld kan verdienen gaan ze op zoek naar een champion, maar ze vinden: Gucci. 

ŌŁÉ Meer Herres? Check http://npo3.nu/herres

Welkom op het Marburg VMBO College. De slechtste middelbare school van Nederland. Hier leer je maar ├®├®n ding - overleven. Dit is het afvoerputje van het Nederlandse schoolsysteem. De docenten hier haten hun werk ├®n hun leerlingen - dus zijn onze vrienden (Dex, Rio, Jayden & Tisha) op elkaar aangewezen. Samen proberen ze te chillen, slapend rijk te worden en uit de sh*t te komen.

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Wednesday, March 3, Starship serial number (SN10) successfully completed SpaceXŌĆÖs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ŌĆō approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps were actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipŌĆÖs attitude during flight and enabled a precise landing at the intended location. SN10ŌĆÖs Raptor engines reignited as the vehicle performed the landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad! 

As if the flight test was not exciting enough, SN10 experienced a rapid unscheduled disassembly shortly after landing. These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: La fabrique de l'ignorance | ARTE
snippet.description:
Comment, des ravages du tabac au d├®ni du changement climatique, on instrumentalise la science pour d├®mentir... la science. Une vertigineuse investigation dans les trous noirs de la recherche et de l'information.┬Ā┬Ā

Pourquoi a-t-il fallu des d├®cennies pour admettre officiellement que le tabac ├®tait dangereux pour la sant├® ? Comment expliquer qu'une part importante de la population croie toujours que les activit├®s humaines sont sans cons├®quence sur le changement climatique ? Les pesticides n├®onicotino├»des sont-ils vraiment responsables de la surmortalit├® des abeilles ? Pourquoi la reconnaissance du bisph├®nol A comme perturbateur endocrinien n'a-t-elle motiv├® que de timides interdictions ? Au travers de ces "cas d'├®cole" qui, des laboratoires aux r├®seaux sociaux, r├®sultent tous de batailles planifi├®es ├Ā coups de millions de dollars et dŌĆÖeuros, cette enqu├¬te ├Ā cheval entre l'Europe et les ├ētats-Unis d├®voile les contours d'une offensive m├®connue, pourtant lanc├®e d├©s les ann├®es 1950, quand la recherche r├®v├©le que le tabac constitue un facteur de cancer et d'accidents cardiovasculaires. Pour contrer une v├®rit├® d├®rangeante, car susceptible d'entra├«ner une r├®glementation accrue au prix de lourdes pertes financi├©res, l'industrie imagine alors en secret une forme particuli├©re de d├®sinformation, qui se g├®n├®ralise aujourd'hui : susciter, en finan├¦ant, entre autres, abondamment des ├®tudes scientifiques concurrentes, un ├®pais nuage de doute qui alimente les controverses et ├®gare les opinions publiques.

Agnotologie 
Cette instrumentalisation de la science ├Ā des fins mensong├©res a g├®n├®r├® une nouvelle discipline de la recherche : l'agnotologie, litt├®ralement, science de la "production d'ignorance". Outre quelques-uns de ses repr├®sentants reconnus, dont l'historienne am├®ricaine des sciences Naomi Oreskes, cette investigation donne la parole ├Ā des acteurs de premier plan du combat entre "bonne" et "mauvaise" science, dont les passionnants "d├®couvreurs" des m├®faits du bisph├®nol A. Elle expose ainsi les m├®canismes cach├®s qui contribuent ├Ā retarder, parfois de plusieurs d├®cennies, des d├®cisions vitales, comme le trucage des protocoles, voire la fabrication ad hoc de rats transg├®niques pour garantir les r├®sultats souhait├®s. Elle explique enfin, au plus pr├©s de la recherche, pourquoi nos soci├®t├®s dites "de l'information" s'accommodent si bien de l'inertie collective qui, dans le doute, favorise le business as usual et la consommation sans frein.

La fabrique de l'ignorance 
Reportage de Franck Cuvelier et Pascal Vasselin (France, 2020, 1h37mn)
#cigarette #complot #5g


Abonnez-vous ├Ā la cha├«ne ARTE https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCwI-JbGNsojunnHbFAc0M4Q/?sub_confirmation=1

Suivez-nous sur les r├®seaux !

Cette instrumentalisation de la science ├Ā des fins mensong├©res a g├®n├®r├® une nouvelle discipline de la recherche : l'agnotologie, litt├®ralement, science de la "production d'ignorance". Outre quelques-uns de ses repr├®sentants reconnus, dont l'historienne am├®ricaine des sciences Naomi Oreskes, cette investigation donne la parole ├Ā des acteurs de premier plan du combat entre "bonne" et "mauvaise" science, dont les passionnants "d├®couvreurs" des m├®faits du bisph├®nol A. Elle expose ainsi les m├®canismes cach├®s qui contribuent ├Ā retarder, parfois de plusieurs d├®cennies, des d├®cisions vitales, comme le trucage des protocoles, voire la fabrication ad hoc de rats transg├®niques pour garantir les r├®sultats souhait├®s. Elle explique enfin, au plus pr├©s de la recherche, pourquoi nos soci├®t├®s dites "de l'information" s'accommodent si bien de l'inertie collective qui, dans le doute, favorise le business as usual et la consommation sans frein.

La fabrique de l'ignorance 
Reportage de Franck Cuvelier et Pascal Vasselin (France, 2020, 1h37mn)

snippet.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle speak out
snippet.description:
In their first wide-ranging interview since leaving the royal family, Prince Harry and Meghan, Duchess of Sussex discuss that decision, plus bouts of depression, racism, family infighting and much more with Oprah Winfrey. Gayle King reports. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

It's Monday 8 March 2021. Our top stories this morning 0:00

The Duke and Duchess of Sussex's much-anticipated interview with Oprah Winfrey has aired in the US - with the couple sharing their side of the story about life in the Royal Family.

The couple spoke about their relationships with other royals, racism and how their mental health suffered.

Meghan spoke with Oprah for most of the interview, before being joined by Prince Harry.

Get the full story ­¤æē http://bbc.in/3rqBdH3

After the teasing clips, the full interview between the Duke and Duchess of Sussex and Oprah Winfrey was shown last night in the US. Oprah with Meghan and Harry: A Primetime Special, is produced by Harpo Productions

Follow the story ­¤æē https://bbc.in/3bnQe6D

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (2-1) | Premier League | Odegaard, Lacazette
snippet.description:
We came from a goal behind to deservedly win a dramatic north London derby.
It was no less than we deserved after a largely dominant performance, but we had to dig deep after Erik Lamela gave the visitors the lead.

Martin Odegaard levelled up before the break and captain for the day Alexandre Lacazette scored the winner from the penalty spot.

There were some late nervy moments - despite playing the last 15 minutes with an extra man after Lamela's red card - but we held on for a well-deserved confidence boosting win.

There's no doubt we made most of the early running, and we certainly were looking positive in possession, trying to mov the ball forward through the organised Tottenham rearguard.

Despite seeing plenty of the ball though, we didn't have a clear sight at goal until Emile Smith Rowe rattled the crossbar with a fine attempt from 20 yards. Hugo Lloris was well beaten in the visitors' goal, but the ball bounced away to safety.

Smith Rowe was the architect of our next chance, cutting the ball back from the byline to the lurking Alexandre Lacazette, but the Frenchman screwed his shot wide from six yards after attempting to open up his body and shoot across goal.

But our dominance began to fade and we were punished on the half hour. Lamela - an early replacement for Heung-Min Son - showed great technique to score inside the far post.

The goal was very much against the run of play, but we kept pushing and hit the woodwork for a second time when Cedric latched onto a loose ball just inside the box and crashed his effort against the upright.

We deserved to be on terms, and finally drew level late in the half through Odegaard. Kieran Tierney got away down the left, sent in a low cross which the Norwegian steered beyond Lloris via a deflection off Toby Alderweireld.

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague 

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

snippet.title: Confused Mercedes 'slower than Red Bull' - F1 testing's big lessons
snippet.description:
F1 testing was shorter than ever in 2021, giving the teams just three days to get themselves ready for the new season. Things look good for Red Bull, but is Mercedes really on the back foot? Scott Mitchell looks at the fortunes of the two teams at the front of the grid, and picks out the other things we've learned from F1 pre-season in Bahrain

snippet.title: Zack SnyderŌĆÖs Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanŌĆÖs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Schoolbezorgd.nl | HERRES #3 | NPO 3
snippet.description:
Broodjes van schoolkantines zijn altijd fokking goor, maar beter dan de sh*t die je van huis mee krijgt amIright? Oh je smeert je eigen boterhammen? Oh ja man, ik ook.
Wanneer de schoolkantine op het Marburg College dichtgaat, komt Tisha met het briljante idee: Schoolbezorgd.nl 

ŌŁÉ Meer Herres? Check http://npo3.nu/herres

Welkom op het Marburg VMBO College. De slechtste middelbare school van Nederland. Hier leer je maar ├®├®n ding - overleven. Dit is het afvoerputje van het Nederlandse schoolsysteem. De docenten hier haten hun werk ├®n hun leerlingen - dus zijn onze vrienden (Dex, Rio, Jayden & Tisha) op elkaar aangewezen. snippet.title: Illegaal vechten in Zweden | DANNY'S WERELD #6
snippet.description:
Danny Ghosen volgt glazenwasser Ruud Vernooij in zijn passie voor vechten. Ruud heeft in het verleden regelmatig gevochten op straat en is nu MMA-vechter. Hij is verslaafd aan de kick die het ├®├®n op ├®├®n gevecht hem geeft. Door de coronapandemie heeft hij echter al een jaar niet in de ring gestaan. Om toch zijn liefde voor het vechten uit te kunnen oefenen doet hij mee aan een illegaal kooigevecht in Zweden. Onder de noemer 'King of the Streets' vinden daar keiharde gevechten plaats. Er gelden namelijk geen regels in de kooi en er wordt met blote vuisten geknokt.

In DannyŌĆÖs wereld gaat Danny Ghosen op zoek naar waar het wringt in onze maatschappij. Hij praat met mensen die moeilijk toegankelijk zijn en tot nu toe onzichtbaar waren voor het grote publiek, mensen die de grens opzoeken of daar overheen zijn gegaan of mensen die zich buitengesloten voelen. Danny komt overal binnen, vraagt door en oordeelt niet. Of het nou gaat om de nieuwste designerdrugs, slachtoffers van mensenhandel of verspreiders van nepnieuws.

Meer over DannyŌĆÖs wereld: https://www.vpro.nl/dannyswereld
Meer zien van Danny: https://www.npo.nl/danny

#vpro #dannyswereld
